summary: Full backend + frontend testing of SuperSearch marketing site. All 6 backend API tests pass. All frontend sections (hero, stats, industry tabs, offerings, team, contact form, footer) render and function correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: logger is used before it is defined (line 93 uses logger.exception but logging.basicConfig and logger assignment are at line 145-149 after route definitions). This works at runtime since routes are called at request time, not import time, but it's a code quality issue worth fixing.
send_contact_email is synchronous and uses blocking I/O (SendGrid HTTP call) inside an async route — could block the event loop under load. Consider running in a thread executor or making it async.
seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_ contact submissions during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows working. SendGrid returns 401 (credits exceeded) as expected — backend still returns 200 and saves to DB. Contact form shows validation toast on empty submit and success toast + 'SENT - THANK YOU' button state on valid submit.
